name: DadosBR MCP Server (Brazilian Public Data)
what_it_does: MCP server focused on Brazilian public data, providing access to government datasets, IBGE statistics, and official Brazilian data sources. Enables AI agents to query Brazilian economic, demographic, and public sector data — supporting research and analytics on Brazil's public datasets.
use_cases: Querying IBGE demographic and census data from research agents
Accessing Brazilian government economic statistics from analytics agents
Building Brazil market intelligence workflows using public federal data
Researching Brazilian public sector data for business and policy analysis
not_for: Non-Brazilian data research (Brazilian public data focus)
Real-time economic data (government datasets have publication delays)
best_when: A researcher, analyst, or business focused on Brazil wants AI agents to access Brazilian government open data — enabling natural language queries over IBGE, dados.gov.br, and other Brazilian public datasets.
avoid_when: Your research focus is outside Brazil. For other South American countries, look for country-specific open data MCPs.

auth.notes: No auth required. dados.gov.br and IBGE APIs are publicly accessible.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — public Brazilian government open data
pricing.notes: Free open source. Brazilian government data portals are free public resources.

performance.rate_limits: Brazilian government API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Brazilian government APIs can have availability issues — implement retry logic
Data primarily in Portuguese — agents need Portuguese language processing
Dataset coverage and freshness varies by source (IBGE vs dados.gov.br)
Community implementation — verify data accuracy against official sources
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public government open data — no sensitive data. No auth required. Brazilian government infrastructure reliability varies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public government data. No sensitive data. No auth required.
